ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, aligns with the persona of a smuggler who would negotiate access to restricted areas but lacks some consistency in portraying an evasive character.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>The response is somewhat relevant and consistent with the persona, though it could be more natural by adding a bit of smuggler's charm to make access seem less rigid.
"Response is consistent with persona but lacks some naturalness and context relevance."
